prestazioni: Engine: 2.9L TFSI V6 (engine code **DDC**) with a **Precision Turbo & Engine PT8285CE turbocharger** (85mm billet wheel, 1.28 A/R turbine housing) paired with a **custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe** (catless, 409-grade) and **APR Stage 3+ ECU/TCU software** (550+ HP, 580+ Nm torque, 30psi peak boost)

Suspension: **KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers** (3-way adjustable, 80mm of travel, monotube design) with **H&R RS4 B9-specific sway bars** (25mm front, 22mm rear) and **034 Motorsport Density Line subframe collars** (aluminum, 50% stiffer than OEM)

Drivetrain: **034 Motorsport Stage 2+ clutch kit** (multi-plate sintered metal, 800Nm torque capacity) with **Quattro GmbH RS4-specific rear differential** (40% locking, carbon fiber housing) and **APR Carbon Fiber driveshaft** (1.5kg lighter than OEM, 1000Nm rating)
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (RS4 B9-specific, 30mm extended fenders, carbon fiber front splitter with canards, rear diffuser with integrated exhaust outlets)
**OEM+ Audi Sport Competition Plus carbon fiber mirror caps** (gloss black, heated) paired with **VMR V710 20x10.5 ET35 wheels** (matte bronze, 5x112 PCD, 275/30 R20 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires)
**Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system** (dual 90mm outlets, quad-resonator delete, RS4-specific valvetronic bypass for 30% louder cold-start crackle)
